# Application Profile (AP)

## Filter by application profile's name

Example: name

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_ap.name:iserver.output.default
```

Developer

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_ap.name:devel.debug
```

Example: tenant and name

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_ap.tenant_name:iserver.output.default
```

Developer

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_ap.tenant_name:devel.debug
```
